import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut out = ""
mut i = 0
while i < list.len(tokens)
  let t = match list.get(tokens, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    ""
  end
  if i == 0
    out = "#{t} #{t}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{t} #{t}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
print(out)
